metadata.title: Ideogram V3 - AI Image Generator & Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: Ideogram V3 by Ideogram AI. Latest generation image generation model offering text-to-image, image editing, reframing, and remixing with improved consistency and creative control. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

hero.title: Ideogram V3
hero.description: Ideogram's latest generation image model. Offering text-to-image, image editing, reframing, and remixing with improved consistency and creative control.

introduce.title: About Ideogram V3
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Ideogram V3 API is the latest generation of Ideogram's image generation model, offering text-to-image, image editing, reframing, and remixing with improved consistency.

items.title: Text-to-Image
items.description: Generate stunning images from text descriptions with exceptional quality and creativity.

items.title: Image Editing
items.description: Edit and transform existing images with precise control and creative flexibility.

items.title: Reframing
items.description: Intelligently reframe and adapt images across different aspect ratios.

items.title: Remixing
items.description: Remix and combine visual elements for unique creative outputs.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes Ideogram V3 a comprehensive image generation solution.

items.title: Dual Generation Modes
items.description: Supports both text-to-image generation and image-to-image editing for versatile workflows.

items.title: Improved Consistency
items.description: Enhanced consistency across generations for reliable, predictable results.

items.title: Creative Control
items.description: Extensive creative control options for fine-tuning artistic direction.

items.title: Fast Processing
items.description: Optimized for quick generation without compromising quality.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: Seamless API access for developers to integrate into applications.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated and edited images.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of Ideogram V3.

items.title: Marketing Content
items.description: Create compelling marketing visuals with consistent brand imagery.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Generate engaging social media content with creative reframing options.

items.title: Design Projects
items.description: Accelerate design workflows with versatile generation and editing tools.

items.title: E-commerce
items.description: Create product images and lifestyle shots with consistent quality.

items.title: Creative Exploration
items.description: Explore artistic directions with remixing and creative control features.

items.title: Content Adaptation
items.description: Adapt visual content across different formats and aspect ratios.

items.title: What is Ideogram V3?
items.description: Ideogram V3 is Ideogram's latest generation image generation model offering text-to-image, editing, reframing, and remixing capabilities.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Ideogram V3 supports both Text To Image (generating images from text) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: What is reframing?
items.description: Reframing allows you to intelligently adapt images across different aspect ratios while maintaining visual coherence.

items.title: What is remixing?
items.description: Remixing lets you combine and transform visual elements to create unique creative outputs.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with Ideogram V3 through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: How does it compare to previous versions?
items.description: Ideogram V3 offers improved consistency, enhanced creative control, and more versatile generation capabilities.

cta.title: Ready to Try Ideogram V3?
cta.description: Experience Ideogram's latest generation image model. Create, edit, and remix with creative control.
